creator: tmdraney@verizon.net
text:
Still not working here.  I tried with and without hal built into 
xorg-server.  I have the most recent revision from ports installed.  
With and without moused.  I am running 7.0-Stable.  I have a wireless 
usb microsoft optical mouse.  Attached is my current Xorg.0.log.  I 
think something is being auto detected wrongly.  It says my mouse type 
is Silken.  I tried a simple imps/2 and intellimouse as the type and I 
have not control over the mouse.  The wheel works everywhere else 
(knoppix and freesbie).

Any help would be appreciated.
